U need to play around double casting posse, basically u burst every 2-3 turns with: 2 Ham rouse card, 2 defiant blade,Lotan ult,Vuln on enemy. So if u have the aliemus and no Lotan cards there's 3 draw posse u can double cast, and if no aliemus u have many options. Ham is mandatory, ram is maybe not absolutely needed but is almost mandatory.
For mob just kill after u rouse and have Vuln on enemy
Use ults where u see fit
Vs W4 I played differently I didn't do much strike dmg cuz boss has so much hp and Oe spam instead
Do you only grab hameln rouse for faster double posse?
No no Ham Rouse is crucial
It's why u play him
It's to double defiant blade
That's all u do with it
Basically if u play enough strikes defiant blade had "negative cost" so even if u +2 arith from Ham its still 0 cost
And is now double casted
So other than hamel rouse no other rouse

Fun but don't spam it without purpose. Aftershock means if you discard it the effect triggers in this case it will cleanse some Sacrifice stacks. Sacrifice stays between fights in same stage. Also if you Hymn and kill in same turn, the next fight the delayed Sacrifice will still be applied.
